title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Bosch India Software Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Bosch India Software Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Bosch India Software Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Bosch India Software Digital Technologies:
Bosch India Software Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bosch India Software Digital Technologies!
